title: WELTRXE Non Slip Bath Mats for Inside Bath, 69 x 36 cm Clear Pebble Bath Mat Non Slip Anti Mould, Anti Slip Shower Mat, Flexible Oval PVC Bathtub Mat with Suction Cups & Drain Holes, Machine Washable
features: 👣【Durable PVC Material】🚿WELTRXE bathtub mats are made of eco-friendly PVC material, BPA free, non-toxic, phthalate free, and latex free,very sturdy and healthy.

👣【Non Slip Design】🚿Pebble design and textured surface provide massage experience in shower time as it comes with 165 suction cups, meanwhile featuring necessary anti-slip function. Just moisten the tub or floor with a little bit of water and then press mat firmly on surface.
👣【Perfect shape and soft design】🚿This unique oval shape bath mat measured 69 x 36cm，it will perfect decorate your bathroom. Comfortable design make both kids and elders enjoy the shower time.
👣【Anti-Bacterial and Mildew Resistant】🚿The shower mat has many drain holes in it for the water to circulate & reduce surface water while bathing. It is a great choice for home, gym, spa and hotel.
👣【Machine Washable】🚿Our bath mats are machine and hand washable, Simply toss the mat into the machine and enjoy its fresh appearance. Hang to dry after use to avoid mold and mildew.
description: Product Description Already fed up with the slippery and nondurable breading bathtub mat? Our innovative bathroom mat offers another solution! Whether you are a person who likes to soak in the tub or stand directly under the shower. It is a good investment on a Non slip and just the right size bathroom mat. Not only the bath mat can be placed inside the bathtub but also outside the tub. so will be perfect for daily use,and also can be a sweet gift for parents, relatives, friends, girls, kids and anyone you loved. Great Design Pebble design for comfortable Massage function and bathroom decor Textured and clear surface to avoid slipping and make it a good looking Powerful suction cups that work on any smooth and clean tub or shower floor Drain holes allow water to pass through in case that water pools on the mat Note: The mat will have a bit of plastic odors at first, please don't worry, it does no harm and will fade away soon. Easy for Care Machine and hand washable with clean water, simply toss the mat into the machine and enjoy its fresh appearance. Hang in natural wind to let it dry quickly for years of safe, healthy, hassle-free use. Our shower mats are antibacterial, BPA free, non-toxic, phthalate free, and latex free. Recommend rinsing and drying your mat after each use to remove oily and slippery buildup that may occur from various soaps and hair products. NOTE: Do not directly expose bath mat to sunlight! Comfortable and Safe Pebble design provide massage experience in shower time as it comes with many suction cups, meanwhile featuring necessary anti-slip function. Powerful suction cups help hold in place on smooth surfaces and offer 360 degree safety protection for users. Our bathtub mat is a great choice for the home, gym, spa and more! NOTE: Make sure the mat suck on surface firmly before you step or lie on it. Children should use the mat with the guardianship of parents! PVC Bath Mat Test Reports By TUV Rheinland WELTRXE PVC Bath Mats are BPA free, non-toxic, phthalate free, and latex free. It's safe for kids, pregnant and elder.
